_meta.purpose: Architecture reference for agents implementing new features

stack.frontend: React 18.3 + Babel standalone (no build step — single HTML file)
stack.persistence: JSON on disk (data/timeseries.json), in-memory Map during run
stack.deploy: Docker → GCP Artifact Registry → Cloud Run (southamerica-east1)

files.src/server.ts: Express entry point, all routes, caches, refresh scheduler, seed runner
files.src/config.ts: Env-var loader (hand-rolled dotenv), exports config object + assertConfig()
files.src/metalpriceClient.ts: metalpriceapi.com HTTP client — fetchLatest, fetchTimeframe, fetchChange
files.src/newsClient.ts: NewsData.io + RSS feed fetcher, HTML entity decoder, article tagging
files.src/storage.ts: Timeseries disk persistence — hydrateTimeseries, persistTimeseries, SIGTERM hook
files.public/index.html: Entire frontend: React components, METALS config, state, data fetching
files.public/tweaks-panel.jsx: Draggable dev panel (postMessage protocol); useTweaks hook + UI components
files.Dockerfile: Two-stage build: builder (npm ci + tsc) → runner (node dist/server.js)
files..github/workflows/deploy.yml: Push to main → docker build → push to Artifact Registry → Cloud Run deploy

SEED_DEPTH_DAYS.description: days of history to seed on startup (5 years)

NEWS_API_KEY.description: newsdata.io key; RSS feeds work without it

endpoints.latest: GET /latest?api_key&base=USD&currencies=... — current rates for all TRACKED symbols

metalpriceapi.rateFormat: response.rates[SYMBOL] = unitsPerUSD (e.g. 0.0095 barrels/USD for oil, 0.000213 oz/USD for gold)
metalpriceapi.plan: Essential: 30-min refresh, 1000 req/month. BRENT+WTI confirmed available on Essential.

queries: precious metals OR base metals OR Brazilian real OR commodities geopolitics
cobalt supply OR nickel market OR copper price OR palladium platinum
newsdata_io.note: Only called when NEWS_API_KEY is set

conversion.INDUSTRIAL: usdPerOunce = 1/rate; usdPerGram = usdPerOunce / 28.349523125 (avdp oz); usdPerPound = usdPerGram * 453.59237
conversion.XCO: same as industrial but stores usdPerMetricTon = usdPerGram * 1_000_000
conversion.FX: stored as fxUsdXxx = unitsPerUsd (direct exchange rate, e.g. BRL per 1 USD)

displayAdjustments.XCU: -0.15 subtracted from lb price before display (visual correction)
displayAdjustments.NI: -0.15 subtracted from lb price before display (visual correction)

routes.note: per-name aliases for all 12 symbols (backward compat)

routes.returns: { success, message }; clears caches, re-fetches all symbols
{ items: NewsItem[], configured: bool, stale?: bool }; 30-min cache

serverInternals.caches: Map<symbol, MetalCache> — in-memory, keyed by symbol string
serverInternals.lastFetchBySymbol: Map<symbol, timestamp> — guards MIN_REFRESH_MS (60s) per symbol
serverInternals.timeseriesBySymbol: Map<symbol, SeriesPoint[]> — MAX_SERIES_POINTS=4000; appended every refresh if >60s since last point
serverInternals.coalesceRefresh: Singleton-promise pattern — concurrent cache-miss requests collapse into one upstream call
serverInternals.ready: Promise that resolves after first refresh or READY_TIMEOUT_MS (10s); all /api routes await it
serverInternals.seedHistory: IIFE on startup; fetches historical data in 365-day chunks; skips already-covered ranges; 500ms between chunks
serverInternals.persistInterval: setInterval(persistTimeseries, 5min) during run; SIGTERM/SIGINT flush via registerGracefulPersist
serverInternals.newsCache: { items: NewsItem[], fetchedAt: number }; TTL 30min; stale-on-error fallback; max 60 items, 48h age

state.rawData: full timeseries response; keyed by symbol
state.timeframe: selected window in days; options: 1,5,30,90,365,1095,0(ALL); default 365
state.tweaks: persisted layout config: layout, density, chartStyle, showChange, heroMetal, colorScheme
state.expandedKey: symbol key of open DetailPanel, or null
state.lastUpdated: string; derived from latest XAU timestamp

layout.editorial: HeroCard (large, heroMetal) + PreciousMetals grid + Industrial&FX grid + NewsFeed
layout.grid: all metals in a single flat grid (no hero)
layout.industrialSet: all METALS where key not in PRECIOUS_KEYS (currently: XCU,NI,XCO,BRL,BRENT,WTI,EUR,CAD)

components.App: Root; owns all state, data fetching, routing
components.Header: Sticky top; brand, date, refresh button, version
components.TickerTape: Horizontal scrollable strip; shows all 12 prices with % change
components.HeroCard: Large card; 2-col grid (meta+price / sparkline); low/high stats; subLabel
components.CompactCard: Smaller card; price + mini sparkline; subLabel if metal.subLabel defined
components.DetailPanel: Slide-in drawer (right on desktop, bottom on mobile); full chart, stats table, period returns
components.Sparkline: Canvas; supports area/line/bar styles; 800ms animated entry; ResizeObserver + DPR-aware
components.ChangeBadge: % change with directional arrow; green=up, red=down, muted=flat
components.FilterChips: ALL + per-metal tag buttons for news feed; active chip uses metal.cssColor
components.NewsCard: Article card; source, timeAgo, title link, description excerpt, tag badges
components.NewsFeed: News section; loading skeleton, unconfigured hint, filter chips, article list

checklist: 1. Verify symbol on metalpriceapi (GET /latest?currencies=SYMBOL) — check it returns data on current plan
2. Decide conversion type: FX (direct rate), OIL (1/rate = $/barrel), or metal (1/rate → oz → gram → target unit)
4. src/server.ts — add to appropriate Set (PRECIOUS / OIL / FX) OR add explicit case in refreshSymbolCache, refreshAllSymbols, ingestChunk, getDisplayValue
5. src/server.ts — if new unit type needed, add field to MetalCache type
6. public/index.html — add CSS variable in :root block
7. public/index.html — add entry to METALS array with key, name, unit, color, cssColor, fmt, optional subLabel
8. No frontend route/fetch changes needed — /api/allmetals/timeseries returns all TRACKED symbols automatically
9. Run: npx tsc --noEmit to verify no type errors before pushing
addingNewSymbol.fxPattern: BRL/EUR/CAD: add to FX Set; store fxUsdXxx = unitsPerUsd; getDisplayValue returns fxUsdXxx
addingNewSymbol.oilPattern: BRENT/WTI: add to OIL Set; store usdPerBarrel = 1/unitsPerUsd
addingNewSymbol.metalPattern: precious: add to PRECIOUS Set; industrial: none — falls into else branch; XCO-like (ton): add explicit check

addingNewRoute.note: Add routes BEFORE app.use(express.static(...)) to avoid static handler intercepting /api/* paths
addingNewRoute.ready_guard: All /api handlers are guarded by the app.use('/api', ...) middleware that awaits the ready promise

addingFrontendSection.pattern: Define React component in <script type='text/babel'> block; add to App's return JSX inside <main>
addingFrontendSection.statePattern: Add useState at App level; fetch in the existing useEffect or a separate one
addingFrontendSection.stylingPattern: Inline styles only (no CSS classes except for .skel skeleton animation); use CSS vars from :root
addingFrontendSection.metalsReference: METALS array is global const; access via METALS.find(m => m.key === 'X') or Object.fromEntries(METALS.map(m => [m.key, m]))

knownGotchas: border shorthand + borderLeft: use borderTop/Right/Bottom individually to avoid CSS transition bug on left accent bar
pubDate from NewsData.io is 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS' with no timezone — must append 'T' and 'Z' before Date.parse()
pubDate from RSS feeds is RFC 2822 — Date.parse() handles correctly without transformation
canvas Sparkline: call paint() synchronously first; ResizeObserver should only repaint on genuine canvas.width changes to avoid double-fire cancellation loop
metalpriceapi rates are unitsPerUsd (inverted) — always compute displayValue as 1/rate for price assets
XCU and NI display values have a -0.15/lb visual adjustment applied in fmt() and subLabel()
ESM project (type:module) — all imports must use .js extension in TypeScript source
RegExpMatchArray[n] and RegExpExecArray[n] are string|undefined under noUncheckedIndexedAccess — use ?? '' guards
tweaks-panel.jsx loaded as second babel script — all exports attached to window via Object.assign
